{# minimal-clean.html — Ultra-clean whitespace for focused, distraction-free presentations #} {% extends "base_reveal.html" %} {% set style = { "reveal_theme": "white", "font_heading": "'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif", "font_body": "'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif", "heading_color": "#111827", "text_color": "#374151", "accent_color": "#059669", "link_hover": "#047857", "table_header_bg": "#059669", "table_stripe_bg": "rgba(5,150,105,0.05)", "blockquote_bg": "rgba(5,150,105,0.04)", "code_bg": "#f9fafb" } %} {% set transition = "fade" %} {% block extra_css %} .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h1 { font-weight: 300; font-size: 2.8em; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h3 { font-weight: 300; color: #9ca3af; } .reveal h2, .reveal h3 { font-weight: 500; } .reveal ul { list-style: none; margin-left: 0; } .reveal ul li { padding-left: 1.5em; position: relative; } .reveal ul li::before { content: "—"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: {{ style.accent_color }}; } .reveal table th { font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.85em; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } {% endblock %}
